Title: Sign Up with Valid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page.
2. Enter the username, password, and email.
3. Click the sign-up button.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: Sign Up with Existing Username
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page.
2. Enter the username, password, and email.
3. Click the sign-up button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the username already exists.

Title: Login with Valid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Login with Invalid Password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the username and incorrect password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating invalid credentials.

Title: Geolocation with Valid Coordinates
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the geolocation page.
2. Enter the latitude and longitude.
3. Click the geolocation button.
Expected Result: User's location is updated successfully.

Title: Geolocation with Invalid Coordinates
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the geolocation page.
2. Enter invalid latitude and longitude.
3. Click the geolocation button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating invalid coordinates.

Title: Create Announcement with Valid Inputs
Test Data: title: "Test Announcement", description: "This is a test announcement.", price: 100.00
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement creation page.
2. Enter the title, description, and price.
3. Click the create announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is created successfully and displayed on the dashboard.

Title: Create Announcement with Empty Title
Test Data: title: "", description: "This is a test announcement.", price: 100.00
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement creation page.
2. Leave the title field empty and enter the description and price.
3. Click the create announcement button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the title cannot be empty.

Title: Book Announcement with Valid Inputs
Preconditions: User is logged in, announcement exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement page.
2. Select the announcement to book.
3. Click the book announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is booked successfully and displayed on the user's dashboard.

Title: Book Nonexistent Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement page.
2. Attempt to book an announcement with an invalid ID.
3. Click the book announcement button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the announcement does not exist.

Title: Filter Announcements by Category
Preconditions: User is logged in, announcements exist
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement filtering page.
2. Select the category to filter by.
3. Click the filter button.
Expected Result: Announcements matching the selected category are displayed.

Title: Filter Announcements with Invalid Category
Preconditions: User is logged in, announcements exist
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement filtering page.
2. Select an invalid category.
3. Click the filter button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the category is invalid.

Title: Accept Announcement with Valid Inputs
Preconditions: User is logged in, announcement exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement page.
2. Select the announcement to accept.
3. Click the accept announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is accepted successfully and marked as accepted.

Title: Accept Nonexistent Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement page.
2. Attempt to accept an announcement with an invalid ID.
3. Click the accept announcement button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the announcement does not exist.

Title: View Announcement with Valid Inputs
Preconditions: User is logged in, announcement exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement page.
2. Select the announcement to view.
3. Click the view announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement details are displayed.

Title: View Nonexistent Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement page.
2. Attempt to view an announcement with an invalid ID.
3. Click the view announcement button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the announcement does not exist.

Title: Modify Announcement with Valid Inputs
Preconditions: User is logged in, announcement exists
Test Data: announcementId: 1, title: "Modified Title", description: "Modified Description", price: 150.00
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement modification page.
2. Enter the modified title, description, and price.
3. Click the modify announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is modified successfully and updated on the dashboard.

Title: Modify Nonexistent Announcement
Test Data: announcementId: 99999, title: "Modified Title", description: "Modified Description", price: 150.00
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement modification page.
2. Enter the modified title, description, and price.
3. Click the modify announcement button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the announcement does not exist.

Title: Delete Announcement with Valid Inputs
Preconditions: User is logged in, announcement exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement deletion page.
2. Select the announcement to delete.
3. Click the delete announcement button.
Expected Result: Announcement is deleted successfully and removed from the dashboard.

Title: Delete Nonexistent Announcement
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement deletion page.
2. Attempt to delete an announcement with an invalid ID.
3. Click the delete announcement button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the announcement does not exist.

Title: Modify Account with Valid Inputs
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account modification page.
2. Enter the new username, password, and email.
3. Click the modify account button.
Expected Result: Account is modified successfully and updated on the dashboard.

Title: Modify Account with Existing Username
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the account modification page.
2. Enter the new username, password, and email.
3. Click the modify account button.
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the username already exists.
